body:
## Type

bug

## Target

skills/pdf-lab

## Target paths

- skills/pdf-lab

## Current state

A non-mocked 10-page live reviewer run over NIST SP 800-53r5 produced high-confidence findings that non-table regions are materialized as table blocks: page 31 footnotes 15-20 as actual:p31:table:0 with footer chrome merged; page 33 footnote 23 as actual:p33:table:0 with footer text merged; page 415 top header/reference region as actual:p415:table:0 with artificial pipe split. All page calls returned raw_ok:true and validation ok:true.

## Requested outcome

pdf_oxide table detection rejects footnote rules, footer/header chrome, and bibliography/reference text when there is no visible grid or tabular alignment; affected regions should remain footnote/reference/page_chrome text blocks rather than table candidates.

## Required proof

Required proof: rerun the same 10-page packet non-mocked with mocked:false/live:true; pages 31, 33, and 415 no longer contain reviewer findings p31-footnotes-false-table, p33-footnote-false-table, or p415_spurious_header_ref_table, and any replacement blocks preserve footnote/reference/page_chrome semantics. Current failing proof root: /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_auth_fix.

## Route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Maintainer route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Requested repair agent

agent-skill-maintainer

## Non-goals

No unrelated refactors or scope expansion.

## Ticket type details

- **Observed failure:** A non-mocked 10-page live reviewer run over NIST SP 800-53r5 produced high-confidence findings that non-table regions are materialized as table blocks: page 31 footnotes 15-20 as actual:p31:table:0 with footer chrome merged; page 33 footnote 23 as actual:p33:table:0 with footer text merged; page 415 top header/reference region as actual:p415:table:0 with artificial pipe split. All page calls returned raw_ok:true and validation ok:true.
- **Expected behavior:** pdf_oxide table detection rejects footnote rules, footer/header chrome, and bibliography/reference text when there is no visible grid or tabular alignment; affected regions should remain footnote/reference/page_chrome text blocks rather than table candidates.
- **Reproduction or artifact:** Inspect /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_auth_fix/summary.json and page model_review.json files for pages 31, 33, and 415; compare page.png with bbox_overlay_current.png in each page directory.

<!-- ticket-skill
type: bug
target: skills/pdf-lab
route: backend_python_or_skill_runtime
agent: agent-skill-maintainer
-->

This ticket must be resolved under `best-practices-github-ticket`. Closure requires deterministic proof; WebGPT review or CI green alone is not closure proof.

comments.body:
Live evidence update for the false-table repair.

mocked: no for the reviewer rerun and real PDF snapshots; live: yes for reviewer/model calls
mocked: no for deterministic pytest fixtures, but those fixtures only prove the applier rule behavior

What was exercised:
- A NIST-specific `table_false_positive_suppression_rule` was added for short full-width table artifacts whose raw rows match observed footnote, footer/page-chrome, underscore-rule, or bracketed-reference signatures.
- The rule was exercised by focused pytest coverage and by real extraction snapshots for pages 31, 33, and 415.
- The same 10-page live reviewer packet was rerun after the patch.

Focused deterministic checks:
- `uv run pytest -q tests/test_nist_table_duplicate_suppression.py` -> 11 passed
- `uv run pytest -q tests/test_nist_footnote_preset.py tests/test_nist_running_header_merge.py tests/test_nist_top_header_chrome_preset.py tests/test_nist_table_duplicate_suppression.py` -> 15 passed
- `uv run python -m py_compile python/pdf_oxide/presets/applier.py scripts/pdf_lab/snapshot_current_extraction.py` -> passed
- `python3 -m json.tool python/pdf_oxide/presets/document_families/nist_sp_800_53r5_promotion_ledger.json` -> `json-ok`

Real PDF extraction snapshots:
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/after_table_fp_patch/page_0031.json` -> table_count 0, `actual:p31:table:0` absent
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/after_table_fp_patch/page_0033.json` -> table_count 0, `actual:p33:table:0` absent
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/after_table_fp_patch/page_0415.json` -> table_count 0, `actual:p415:table:0` absent

Live reviewer comparison:
- Before patch summary: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_auth_fix/summary.json`
- After patch summary: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch/summary.json`
- Removed finding IDs: `p31-footnotes-false-table`, `p33-footnote-false-table`, `p415_spurious_header_ref_table`
- Latest live rerun command exited 0 and produced `raw_ok:true` responses for all 10 pages.

What remains unverified:
- The 10-page sample has not converged. The latest live reviewer summary still reports 16 findings, including footnote typing/continuation/citation corruption and reference/header semantics.
- This comment is evidence for the false-table bug only, not for all pdf_oxide NIST extraction quality.

<!-- agent-lease
agent: agent-skill-maintainer
lease_id: 20260630T142417Z-agent-skill-maintainer-71
issue: 71
-->

Lease: maintainer-active by agent-skill-maintainer.
Scope: one ticket.
Closure requirement: deterministic proof comment before close.

# Ticket #71 Proof: NIST false table suppression

Issue: https://github.com/grahama1970/agent-skills/issues/71

## Scope

Resolve the narrow false-table regression for the NIST 10-page packet:

- `p31-footnotes-false-table`
- `p33-footnote-false-table`
- `p415_spurious_header_ref_table`

This proof does not claim the remaining footnote typing, continuation, or citation-text defects are fixed. Those remain tracked by #72.

## Patch Evidence

Relevant modified pdf_oxide files:

- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/python/pdf_oxide/presets/applier.py`
- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/tests/test_nist_table_duplicate_suppression.py`

The patch adds a NIST short-table false-positive rule path and focused regression coverage for pages 31, 33, and 415 while preserving a real QID table fixture.

## Deterministic Checks

```bash
uv run pytest -q tests/test_nist_table_duplicate_suppression.py
```

Result:

```text
11 passed in 0.13s
```

```bash
uv run python -m py_compile python/pdf_oxide/presets/applier.py scripts/pdf_lab/snapshot_current_extraction.py scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py
```

Result: exit code 0.

```bash
python3 -m json.tool /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/python/pdf_oxide/presets/document_families/nist_sp_800_53r5_promotion_ledger.json
```

Result: exit code 0, `json-ok`.

## Live Reviewer Evidence

Artifact:

`/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch/summary.json`

Summary fields:

```text
schema: pdf_oxide.next30_agentic_second_pass.summary.v1
page_count: 10
raw_ok_count: 10
ok_count: 10
target_false_table_ids_present: []
```

Real extraction snapshot checks:

```text
page_0031: contains_target_table_ids=[], contains_type_table=False, contains_table_block=False
page_0033: contains_target_table_ids=[], contains_type_table=False, contains_table_block=False
page_0415: contains_target_table_ids=[], contains_type_table=False, contains_table_block=False
```

Snapshots:

- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/after_table_fp_patch/page_0031.json`
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/after_table_fp_patch/page_0033.json`
- `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/after_table_fp_patch/page_0415.json`

## Proof Boundary

- `mocked: no` for the reviewer rerun and extraction snapshot checks.
- `live: yes` for the 10-page reviewer summary artifact.
- Focused pytest is deterministic local regression coverage, not live model evidence.
- Remaining #72 footnote findings are still present in this same live summary and are not covered by this closure.

title: pdf_oxide NIST pass misclassifies footnotes and header/reference chrome as tables
